bridge_isolate.description: Enable bridge port isolation for the wireless interface

iface.description: List of interfaces this VLAN is associated with

isolate.description: Isolates wireless clients from each other

multicast_to_unicast.description: Request that the AP will do multicast-to-unicast conversion for ARP, IPv4, and IPv6 frames

network.description: Specifies one or multiple logical network interfaces declared in the network configuration, each one should be a L3 bridge to be able to attach this L2 wireless interface.

network_vlan.description: Make a wireless interface a tagged member of extra VLANs
